generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former Pentagon strategist, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy strengthens our national security. Countries that rely too much on others for defense end up vulnerable. Look at how Germany's reliance on US missile defense left them exposed during the 2024 crisis. We need to invest in our own capabilities to ensure our safety and sovereignty. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
